description: Product Description KARBAG Clear Drawer Organizer Highly transparent acrylic material, items can be seen at a glance, compartment design, neat storage. The Acrylic Makeup Organizer is the perfect accessory for anyone who loves to keep their beauty products neatly organized. DURABLE PS MATERIAL The cosmetic storage organizer is made from high-quality PS material, which is easy to clean and durable. No more searching through piles of makeup or rummaging through disorganized drawers - everything will have its designated place in this handy organizer. The transparent design also adds a touch of elegance to your vanity, making it an ideal addition to any decor. STACKABLE DESIGN The acrylic makeup organizer is also stackable, which means you can save space on your dresser or vanity by stacking multiple units. This is particularly useful for those who have limited space in their homes or apartments. COMPARTMENT DESIGN The divider slots are thoughtfully designed with your convenience in mind. They are wide enough to hold most standard-sized makeup products, ensuring a secure fit and preventing them from rolling around inside the organizer. The organizer is just the right size to hold larger items such as foundation, pressed powder and skin care products. Perfect for storing lipstick, small eyeshadow palettes, or brushes. MULTI-PURPOSE USE The Acrylic Makeup Organizer is not limited to makeup storage only; It can also be used to neatly organize office supplies, jewelry, or any small items that would benefit from its sleek and functional design. Its versatility makes it an excellent addition to any room, helping you declutter and maximize space in a stylish and practical manner.
